payload.query: mutation($meteringPointId: String!, $startDate: DateTime!, $customerType: String!, $cpr: String, $cvr: String, $protectedNameAndAddress: Boolean!) { initiateChangeOfSupplier(input: { meteringPointId: $meteringPointId, startDate: $startDate, customerType: $customerType, cpr: $cpr, cvr: $cvr, protectedNameAndAddress: $protectedNameAndAddress }) { boolean } }
